# langgraph-okf

> `langgraph-okf` is a Python library that connects [Open Knowledge Format
> (OKF)](https://okf.md) Markdown bundles to LangGraph and LangChain agent
> workflows: deterministic bundle loading and search, LangChain tools and
> retrievers, a bounded navigator subgraph, a query router, and idempotent
> vector-store synchronization with graph-aware retrieval. It is an
> integration library for OKF, not the OKF specification itself.

`langgraph-okf` is pre-1.0 (alpha). Public APIs are typed and covered by
tests, but signatures may still change between minor versions.

## Core

- [README](https://github.com/RonCodes88/langgraph-okf/blob/main/README.md): install, quick start, and progressively richer usage examples.
- [Concepts](https://github.com/RonCodes88/langgraph-okf/blob/main/docs/concepts.md): concept IDs, optional indexes, broken links, and lexical weighting.
- [API reference](https://github.com/RonCodes88/langgraph-okf/blob/main/docs/api-reference.md): every public class and function, grouped by module.
- [Navigator and budgets](https://github.com/RonCodes88/langgraph-okf/blob/main/docs/navigator-and-budgets.md): traversal strategies and the hop/concept/token budgets that bound them.
- [Vector stores and sync](https://github.com/RonCodes88/langgraph-okf/blob/main/docs/vector-stores.md): store requirements, idempotent sync, and graph-aware retrieval.
- [Testing](https://github.com/RonCodes88/langgraph-okf/blob/main/docs/testing.md): the unit / integration / e2e test tiers and how to opt into each.

## Optional

- [CHANGELOG](https://github.com/RonCodes88/langgraph-okf/blob/main/CHANGELOG.md): release history.
- [CONTRIBUTING](https://github.com/RonCodes88/langgraph-okf/blob/main/CONTRIBUTING.md): development setup and contribution workflow.
- [Official OKF specification](https://okf.md/spec/): the underlying Open Knowledge Format standard this library implements against.
